creator: uzimac@da3m0n8t3r.com
text:
Connecting to WIFI in Wings Restaurant in Mexico City Airport causes system freeze.

I connected to infinitum movil network in Mexico City airport several times w/ dhcp without trouble. Went into Wings Restaurant and connected to their AP. device associates but ip is 0.0.0.0... get a couple of errors in syslog then system freezes solid. I tried 5x and same behavior. Reconnecting to infinitum movil outside had no issues. Might want to check it out. Wish I had more data/stats, had to catch a flight. May need to fly to Mexico City Terminal 2.

ath0: <Atheros 9280> mem 0x95100000-0x9510ffff irq 16 at device 0.0 on pci1
ath0: [HT] enabling HT modes
ath0: [HT] 2 RX streams; 2 TX streams
ath0: AR9280 mac 128.2 RF5133 phy 13.0
ath0: 2GHz radio: 0x0000; 5GHz radio: 0x00c0


# ifconfig wlan0 create wlandev ath0 ssid Wings_wireless 
# ifconfig wlan0 up scan
# wpa_supplicant -B -i wlan0 -c /etc/wpa_supplicant-wings.conf

SSID/MESH ID                     BSSID              CHAN RATE   S:N     INT CAPS
Wings_wireless                   00:04:96:2a:19:cb    1   54M -86:-96  100 EP   SSID<Wings_wireless> RATES<B22,24,48,72,36,96,108> DSPARMS<1> COUNTRY<USI 1-11,30> ???<0b05040020127a> ???<0c12000003a4000027a4000042435e0062-> ERP<0x6> RSN<v1 mc:TKIP uc:TKIP+AES-CCMP km:8021X-PSK> WPA<v1 mc:TKIP uc:AES-CCMP+TKIP km:8021X-PSK> WME<qosinfo 0x80 BE[aifsn 3 cwmin 4 cwmax 10 txop 0] BK[aifsn 7 cwmin 4 cwmax 10 txop 0] VO[aifsn 2 cwmin 3 cwmax 4 txop 94] VI[aifsn 2 cwmin 2 cwmax 3 txop 47]>

Mar  4 10:01:42 p00ntang dhclient[1982]: send_packet: Network is down

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: connect to wifi in Wings Restaurant / Mexico City airport terminal 2
